site.tagline: An AI butler that gets smarter every day
hero.sub: A self-hosted AI butler that lives on your server — persistent memory, extensible skills, 100% open source.
spec.title: SPECIFICATION
days.section.title: 7-Day Assembly
days.section.desc: One module per day, each under an hour. Every command tested on the author's own machine.
migrate.section.title: Migrate from OpenClaw
migrate.section.desc: Both tools share DNA — concepts map 1:1. Here is the author's tested crosswalk.
final.desc: No signup. No API credits. No vendor lock-in. Just a manual, your machine, and seven focused days.
coming_soon.title: English version coming soon
coming_soon.body: The Chinese version is live. English translations welcome via PR.
meta.home.title: Hermes Agent Tutorial · Self-Hosted AI Agent in 7 Days (from OpenClaw)
meta.home.description: Community guide to Hermes Agent: deploy in 7 days, connect Telegram / Discord / Slack / WeChat, install skills, migrate from OpenClaw. Every command tested. 100% open-source MIT.
meta.migrate.title: Migrate from OpenClaw to Hermes Agent · Concept Map + Full Walkthrough
meta.migrate.description: Tested crosswalk from OpenClaw to Hermes Agent: skills, memory, toolsets, bot tokens. Complete hermes claw migrate walkthrough with common pitfalls.
meta.7days.title: Hermes Agent 7-Day Tutorial · Master It in a Week
meta.7days.description: From first install to scheduled tasks: 7-day Hermes Agent course covering model setup, messaging integrations, built-in tools, skills, memory, and diagnostics.
